sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4163" key="a(ligenh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁλι-γενής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n4163.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sea-born</tr_>, of Aphrodite, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.685f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
